headings: Integrating technology in the art of wedding photography
Our happy clients say about us
paragraphs: Our exclusive GoldenBox AI device design and developed by fotographiya (invented by Mohit Barthunia) team captures and delivers memories in real-time. Guests interact, click, and instantly receive enhanced, premium-quality outputs. This is not just photography — it’s live entertainment powered by technology. it recures no internet /no app download / no phone number just click it and get it

Why put album in almiras from ages, where you can display it on your table, Fully customized album designs tailored to your story with a stand. High-end materials, modern layouts, and detailed postproduction ensure a timeless keepsake.

Fotographiya's revolutionary album selection software is a total game changer! With flash-speed and intelligent algorithms, this tool helps you effortlessly put together your dream wedding album. It identifies the most captivating shots, suggesting perfect combinations for each page. You can easily refine the selections to match your personal taste, creating a stunning narrative of your special day.

No need to hire from Outside Our dedicated Reelographer team creates trendy, cinematic reels delivered the same day. No waiting for weeks. Your wedding trends while the celebration is still happening.
We use industry-leading cameras, lenses, drones, and lighting systems to ensure cinematic output under any condition.
Color science, cinematic grading, skin tone optimization, and storytelling edits handled by our technical experts — not freelancers. We are also developing custom softwares for smoothning the process
Dedicated support even after delivery. Revisions, archive management, album updates — we stay connected beyond the event. we are using our custome made CRM software so we can keep you updated
Offering an unmatched suite of services that ensures your wedding photography experience is beyond ordinary.
Explore our wedding photos, candid photography & pre wedding photoshoot stories.
At Fotographiya, we’ve had the honour of collaborating with more than 100 cherished couples, each with their own unique wedding story to tell.
What truly sets us apart from any other wedding photography company is our unwavering commitment to capturing these love stories most extraordinarily, exactly as they’ve always envisioned.
But don’t just take our word for it; check out our portfolio and experience the enchanting artistry our talented photographers bring to life through their lenses.
Trust us to capture the essence of your dream wedding with our innovative approach

about.title: About Fotographiya — Wedding Photographers in Kota & Jaipur
about.metaDescription: Fotographiya is a premium wedding photography and videography company in India. We specialize in destination weddings, pre-wedding shoots, cinematic wedding films, and luxury wedding albums.
paragraphs: To bring world-class professionalism into India's wedding industry.
We built structured workflows, trained teams, created AI-powered tools like GoldenBox, premium album systems, and disciplined operations.
Because luxury is not only about beautiful photos. Luxury is about certainty.
✔ Professional behaviour
No chaos. No insecurity. No disappointment.
To build India’s most trusted wedding media company— and then export our systems to the world.
From a Tier-3 city to global standards
Because India should not only import professionalism. We should create it.

Fotographiya is more than just a team; it's a family of passionate individuals. We're a unique blend of tech geeks, artists, and dreamers fuelled by a shared vision. Our team is restless, always pushing boundaries and exploring innovative ways to use technology to enhance the art of photography.

We are united by a selfless dedication to our mission. You'll find us collaborating, brainstorming, and innovating during the day, and then celebrating our achievements together in the evening because our motto is to work hard and party even harder.
India has the world's largest population and immense talent. But how can we become truly world-class if most service industries remain unstructured and unskilled?
I believe the answer is systems + technology. Instead of talking about change, I chose one unorganized industry — the wedding photography space — and started building structure through Fotographiya.
Our goal is simple: train photographers like professionals, build clear processes with tech, and create reliable experiences where both families and photographers receive world-class service.
Because when systems improve, respect improves. And when respect improves, India moves forward.
Active participation in city-wide events and initiatives has been instrumental in establishing Fotographiya as a leading name in the wedding photography industry.
Our dedication to community engagement has not only expanded our network but also allowed us to give back to the city that has supported our growth.
Immerse yourself in a collection of moments exquisitely captured. Fotographiya's portfolio showcases the magic...

paragraphs: With Fotographiya's QR service, every photo becomes a portal to instant memories. The moment your picture is clicked, the magic happens. Simply scan the unique QR code provided, and your photo is yours to cherish instantly.

With flash-speed and intelligent algorithms, this tool helps you effortlessly put together your dream wedding album.It identifies the most captivating shots, suggesting perfect combinations for each page. Our AI is more than just a tool; it's your personal wedding photo stylist. It scans every image, enhancing colors, perfecting lighting, and even suggesting the best shots for your album.It's like having a world-class photo editor working tirelessly behind the scenes, ensuring your memories look nothing short of extraordinary.

Our handcrafted albums are bespoke masterpieces, crafted to mirror your unique love story. Adorned with sustainable materials and customizable to your heart's desire, these albums are attractive, eye-catching show piece that you can put out on display and leave your guests in the wonder of art.

From the bustling streets of Kota to serene outdoor locations, we find the perfect backdrop for your love story. Our professional photographers will guide you through the process, ensuring you feel relaxed and confident. Our pre-wedding shoots are a blend of art and fun, designed to capture your chemistry and personalities.

Our custom caricatures are unique and entertaining additions to your special day! Whether you want to surprise your guests with an animated wedding come to life or some of their silly little cartoon portraits, Fotographiya won’t let you down. It's a perfect way to add a personal touch to your wedding and create lasting memories

wedding.metaDescription: Fotographiya is a premium wedding photography and videography company in India. We specialize in destination weddings, pre-wedding shoots, cinematic wedding films, and luxury wedding albums.
paragraphs: Fotoraghiya — Wedding Stories
Preserving the magic of your most sacred day — from intimate ceremonies to grand celebrations.

At Fotographiya, we specialize in premium wedding photography and videography tailored to your style. While our roots are in the cultural richness of Rajasthan — capturing destination weddings in the lakes of Udaipur, the pink heritage of Jaipur, the fort-scapes of Jaisalmer, and the vibrant energy of Kota — our lenses have no boundaries. We offer pan India work, traveling wherever your love takes us.

We specialize in a seamless blend of traditional and candid photography. While traditional shots capture the grandeur and rituals of your wedding shoot, our candid wedding photography catches the raw, unscripted joy of your loved ones — creating a cinematic time capsule you'll treasure forever.
Our Wedding Portfolio
Sacred ceremonies, timeless traditions

From sacred rituals to grand receptions — we document every emotion of your traditional wedding celebration with cinematic elegance. Our unobtrusive approach captures authentic moments without interrupting the flow of your most important day.

Comprehensive wedding coverage tailored to your unique celebration — from the first look to the last dance.

Haldi, Mehendi, Sangeet, and all wedding events

Each film is a unique love story — captured with cinematic precision and delivered with soul.
Let's Create Together
Every wedding is a once-in-a-lifetime celebration. Let us preserve yours with the artistry and care it deserves.
Based in Rajasthan · Serving Kota, Jaipur, Udaipur, Jaisalmer & Pan India

headings: Pre-Wedding Photoshoot: Celebrate Your Love Story Before the 'I Do'
Ready to Tell Your Love Story?
paragraphs: Capturing your love stories against the royal backdrops of Udaipur, Jaipur, and Jaisalmer — cinematic pre wedding photoshoot crafted with elegance, passion, and an eye for the extraordinary.

Your journey to the altar deserves to be celebrated. A pre wedding photo session is more than just a trend — it's an intimate experience where you can be yourselves, away from the wedding chaos. Whether you dream of a cinematic pre wedding shoot amidst the golden sand dunes of Jaisalmer, a royal romance in the palaces of Udaipur and Jaipur, or a modern cozy vibe in Kota, we bring your vision to life.

As top wedding photographers, we focus on your unique chemistry. From choosing the perfect locations across Rajasthan to guiding you through effortless poses, we ensure your pre wedding photoshoot feels like a romantic date — not a photo session. Let's create stunning wedding photos before the big day arrives.

destination.metaDescription: Fotographiya is a premium wedding photography and videography company in India. We specialize in destination weddings, pre-wedding shoots, cinematic wedding films, and luxury wedding albums.
headings: Let us Make the Wedding of Your Dreams
paragraphs: From royal palaces to beachfront paradises — we create magical experiences

From serene beaches and historic forts to majestic mountains and desert dunes, destination weddings require a highly versatile, cinematic approach. At Fotographiya, we specialize in adapting to diverse landscapes, transforming stunning outdoor backdrops and natural light into breathtaking visual stories. Our elite team is equipped to shoot anywhere, capturing the raw chemistry, candid laughter, and epic scenery of your dream destination.

We bring advanced production gear and our signature offline GoldenBox AI QR delivery system to the most remote venues—ensuring your guests receive high-resolution photos in real-time, even on beaches or hilltops with zero internet. Combined with same-day cinematic reels and premium handcrafted albums, Fotographiya delivers a flawless, end-to-end luxury experience worldwide.
A visual journey of luxury destination weddings captured by Fotographiya. Click any frame to expand.
We don't just capture photos — we tell your unique love story through artistic visual narratives that you'll cherish forever.
Elegant couple and family portraits captured amidst the grandeur of royal palaces, heritage properties, and iconic destination wedding venues.
We specialize in capturing those unposed, fleeting moments—the laughter, the happy tears, and the genuine joy that make your day truly yours.
Timeless bridal portraits, romantic couple sessions, and cherished family photographs that capture your authentic bond and personality.
Full-day coverage for your Sangeet, Mehendi, Haldi, and all cultural ceremonies, ensuring no tradition is left undocumented.
Frequently asked questions about our AI tools and premium destination services

corporate.title: Corporate Photography & Videography | Fotographiya
corporate.metaDescription: Fotographiya is a premium wedding photography and videography company in India. We specialize in destination weddings, pre-wedding shoots, cinematic wedding films, and luxury wedding albums.
headings: Ready to Capture Your Next Corporate Milestone?
paragraphs: Fotographiya Corporate
We bring destination-grade cinematic storytelling to India's leading corporate assemblies, athletic events, and brand activations. Every milestone, documented with absolute precision.
Empowering Women's Spirit & Community Energy

The Pink Run is Kota and Rajasthan's premier marathon celebrating strength, health, and solidarity across all age groups. Our specialized event photography captures the vibrant sea of pink, the shared enthusiasm, raw determination, and high-energy smiles (josh & utsah) of mothers, daughters, and sisters running together. We document the infectious spirit, collective empowerment, and milestones of this landmark community run.
A glimpse into the events, moments, and milestones we've had the privilege of capturing.
The Technology Advantage

Developed exclusively by Fotographiya, the **GoldenBox** is a local server system that delivers high-quality event photos instantly to attendees. It operates entirely offline — **no internet required, no app downloads, and no phone number shares**. Attendees scan a QR code to download their visual memories in seconds.
Our photographers click professional portraits. Images are wirelessly synced to the local server instantly.
The local GoldenBox AI instantly color-corrects, optimizes exposure, and indexes images.
Attendees approach our live photo desk or screen and scan the secure local QR code.
The attendee retrieves and saves their high-res files directly on their phone within 3 seconds.
Polished, publication-ready headshots of your executive team and staff for corporate profiles, annual reports, and PR.
Comprehensive visual documentation of company milestones. Specialised team coverage for athletic, celebratory, and business events.
Capturing office culture, workspace design, warehouse hubs, and industrial yards for employer branding and corporate dossiers.
Find answers to common corporate booking queries, travel scopes, capabilities, and safety guidelines.

We provide comprehensive shooting capabilities including Traditional photography, Candid photography, Cinematography, Drone Shoots, Photobooths, and Live Screening to cover all facets of your corporate events.

Yes, we travel outstation. Our team provides services for corporate events nationwide across India, including Kota, Jaipur, Delhi NCR, Bangalore, and Mumbai, as well as international business destinations.
Yes, we are fully prepared to service events following all standard guidelines, safety regulations, and government-mandated precautions.

We cover a wide range of premium events including corporate retreats, workplace documentation, product launches, expos, wedding & engagement ceremonies, couple pre-wedding shoots, and milestone anniversary events.
From multi-day summits and national marathons to executive portraits and workspace profiles. Let us craft professional media solutions tailored to your brand scale.

headings: A Sacred Beginning of Two Hearts and Two Families
A Sacred Beginning ofTwo Hearts and Two Families
paragraphs: Where two hearts meet and two families become one.
The Roka ceremony is one of the most cherished pre-wedding rituals in Indian culture. It marks the formal announcement that two families have agreed to the union of their children.
From the moment the groom's family arrives to the tilak ceremony, from the exchange of rings and gifts to the heartfelt blessings of elders – every detail is filled with meaning and emotion.
The Roka ceremony is one of the most cherished pre-wedding rituals in Indian culture.
From the moment the groom's family arrives to the tilak ceremony, every detail is filled with meaning.
Our photography captures not just the rituals, but the emotions behind them.
Every ritual in a Roka ceremony holds deep cultural significance.
We document not just the actions, but the emotions behind them.
These photographs become heirlooms that will remind you of your love story.
A glimpse into beautiful Roka ceremonies
Professional photography services for your special day
